name.zh: 浏览器凭证采集工具命令（迁移）

description.zh: 包含复制 Chrome 登录/Cookie 数据库及运行 SharpWeb、HackBrowserData 的完整操作命令，属于后渗透工具参考而非浏览器 Payload。
description.en: Contains complete operational commands for copying Chrome login or cookie databases and running SharpWeb or HackBrowserData, making it a post-exploitation tool reference rather than a browser payload.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认四个 execution 项均为完整 PowerShell/工具 CLI，不含浏览器输入点、HTML 解析或 WebSocket 消息边界。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that all four execution items are complete PowerShell or tool CLI commands with no browser input point, HTML parsing, or WebSocket message boundary.

prerequisites.zh: 目标工具卡 post-exploitation-windows 与 post-exploitation-tools 存在，并已定义敏感输出的授权、加密与删除要求。
prerequisites.en: The destination cards post-exploitation-windows and post-exploitation-tools exist and define authorization, encryption, and deletion requirements for sensitive output.

overview.zh: 浏览器凭证采集工具命令（迁移）聚焦四项命令分别复制 Chrome 数据库或调用专用采集工具，只能在已获主机执行权限后使用，不能发现 Web 漏洞。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Browser Credential Collection Commands (Tool Migration) focuses on this boundary: The four commands copy Chrome databases or invoke dedicated collection tools and require existing host execution; they cannot discover a web vulnerability. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 原条目将后渗透操作命令误归为浏览器攻击 Payload，导致工具能力与漏洞触发条件混淆。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: The source misclassified post-exploitation operations as browser attack payloads, conflating tool capability with vulnerability trigger conditions. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 按 execution 索引 0-1 迁入 Windows 后渗透命令，2-3 迁入通用后渗透工具，并保持命令字节与标题对应。 迁移证据是每项可独立运行并产生文件或工具输出；成功复制数据库或导出凭证不代表浏览器页面存在漏洞。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Route execution indexes 0-1 to Windows post-exploitation commands and 2-3 to general post-exploitation tools while preserving command bytes and titles. Migration evidence is that each item runs independently and produces a file or tool output; copying a database or exporting credentials does not prove a browser-page vulnerability. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 从 Payload 导航移除该记录，目标工具卡标注 DPAPI、浏览器锁文件、管理员权限与敏感数据保留边界。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Remove the record from payload navigation and document DPAPI, browser locks, privilege requirements, and sensitive-data retention in destination tool cards. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认浏览器凭证工具前置条件
title.en: Confirm Browser Credential Tools prerequisites

description.zh: 四项命令分别复制 Chrome 数据库或调用专用采集工具，只能在已获主机执行权限后使用，不能发现 Web 漏洞。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The four commands copy Chrome databases or invoke dedicated collection tools and require existing host execution; they cannot discover a web vulnerability. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控浏览器凭证工具对照
title.en: Run a controlled Browser Credential Tools comparison

description.zh: 按 execution 索引 0-1 迁入 Windows 后渗透命令，2-3 迁入通用后渗透工具，并保持命令字节与标题对应。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Route execution indexes 0-1 to Windows post-exploitation commands and 2-3 to general post-exploitation tools while preserving command bytes and titles. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对浏览器凭证工具阳性边界
title.en: Verify Browser Credential Tools positive boundaries

description.zh: 迁移证据是每项可独立运行并产生文件或工具输出；成功复制数据库或导出凭证不代表浏览器页面存在漏洞。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Migration evidence is that each item runs independently and produces a file or tool output; copying a database or exporting credentials does not prove a browser-page vulnerability. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归浏览器凭证工具
title.en: Remediate and regress Browser Credential Tools

description.zh: 从 Payload 导航移除该记录，目标工具卡标注 DPAPI、浏览器锁文件、管理员权限与敏感数据保留边界。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Remove the record from payload navigation and document DPAPI, browser locks, privilege requirements, and sensitive-data retention in destination tool cards. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 四个命令没有可注入数据位置：前两项是本地文件复制，后两项是工具启动。阳性只能证明已授权主机上的采集工具可运行；文件存在、工具返回空结果或浏览器保存过密码都不是 Web 漏洞证据，因此决策必须为 tool。
analysis.en: None of the four commands contains an injectable data position: the first two copy local files and the latter two launch tools. A positive result proves only that collection tooling runs on an authorized host; file existence, empty tool output, or saved browser passwords do not establish a web vulnerability, so the decision is tool.

opsecTips.zh: 迁移审阅不执行真实凭证导出；如需冒烟测试，只使用一次性浏览器配置和伪造账户，首个测试记录被识别后停止。
opsecTips.en: Do not export real credentials during migration; if smoke testing is required, use a disposable browser profile with a fake account and stop after the first test record is identified.

opsecTips.zh: 删除复制的 Login Data/Cookies、工具输出和临时目录，关闭测试配置并确认日志与报告中没有 Cookie、密码或密钥。
opsecTips.en: Delete copied Login Data, Cookies, tool output, and temporary directories, close the test profile, and verify that logs and reports contain no cookies, passwords, or keys.

review.rationale: 四项均为完整后渗透 CLI，缺少浏览器请求或解析上下文，应迁工具。

name.zh: target=_blank 的 opener 隔离对照

description.zh: 比较 rel=opener、noopener、noreferrer 与无相关关键字时新标签页是否保留 opener，并以现代浏览器隐式 noopener 为基线。
description.en: Compares rel=opener, noopener, noreferrer, and unrelated link types for opener retention in a new tab, using modern implicit noopener behavior as the baseline.

subCategory.zh: 新浏览上下文 opener 策略

prerequisites.zh: 使用支持 target=_blank 隐式 noopener 的当前浏览器，并记录版本、COOP 响应头与扩展策略。
prerequisites.en: Use a current browser that implements implicit noopener for target=_blank and record the version, COOP headers, and extension policies.

prerequisites.zh: 测试链接和目标页均由授权域控制，目标页只读取 `window.opener === null` 并返回固定布尔标记。
prerequisites.en: Both link and destination pages are controlled, and the destination only reports a fixed Boolean marker for `window.opener === null`.

overview.zh: target=_blank 的 opener 隔离对照聚焦六行是 opener 正负对照，不是 XSS；现代 `_blank` 在未显式 `rel=opener` 时默认按 noopener 处理。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Opener Isolation Controls for target=_blank focuses on this boundary: The six lines are opener positive and negative controls, not XSS; modern `_blank` behaves as noopener unless `rel=opener` explicitly opts in. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自新页面持有 opener 引用并能在允许范围内影响原窗口，而不是链接 HTML 本身执行脚本。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: Risk comes from a new page retaining an opener reference and influencing the original window within permitted capabilities, not from the link HTML executing script. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 逐行打开受控目标，记录 opener 是否为 null；将 rel=opener 作为候选阳性，noopener/noreferrer 与无关 rel 作为现代负对照。 阳性必须由目标页直接证明 opener 非空且能执行允许的受控导航；仅打开新标签、看到 Referer 或链接可点击都不够。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Open the controlled target for each line and record whether opener is null, using rel=opener as the positive candidate and noopener, noreferrer, or unrelated rel values as modern negative controls. Positive evidence requires the destination to prove a non-null opener and perform an allowed controlled navigation; opening a tab, receiving a Referer, or clicking a link is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 不需要 opener 时显式使用 noopener/noreferrer，并通过 COOP 隔离浏览上下文；仅在受信目标确需通信时使用 opener 与 postMessage。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Use noopener or noreferrer when opener access is unnecessary and isolate browsing contexts with COOP; opt into opener only for trusted destinations using postMessage. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认新浏览上下文 opener 策略前置条件
title.en: Confirm New-Context Opener Policy prerequisites

description.zh: 六行是 opener 正负对照，不是 XSS；现代 `_blank` 在未显式 `rel=opener` 时默认按 noopener 处理。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The six lines are opener positive and negative controls, not XSS; modern `_blank` behaves as noopener unless `rel=opener` explicitly opts in. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控新浏览上下文 opener 策略对照
title.en: Run a controlled New-Context Opener Policy comparison

description.zh: 逐行打开受控目标，记录 opener 是否为 null；将 rel=opener 作为候选阳性，noopener/noreferrer 与无关 rel 作为现代负对照。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Open the controlled target for each line and record whether opener is null, using rel=opener as the positive candidate and noopener, noreferrer, or unrelated rel values as modern negative controls. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

attackChain.payload: Click Click (safe) Click Click Click Click

title.zh: 核对新浏览上下文 opener 策略阳性边界
title.en: Verify New-Context Opener Policy positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性必须由目标页直接证明 opener 非空且能执行允许的受控导航；仅打开新标签、看到 Referer 或链接可点击都不够。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires the destination to prove a non-null opener and perform an allowed controlled navigation; opening a tab, receiving a Referer, or clicking a link is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归新浏览上下文 opener 策略
title.en: Remediate and regress New-Context Opener Policy

description.zh: 不需要 opener 时显式使用 noopener/noreferrer，并通过 COOP 隔离浏览上下文；仅在受信目标确需通信时使用 opener 与 postMessage。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Use noopener or noreferrer when opener access is unnecessary and isolate browsing contexts with COOP; opt into opener only for trusted destinations using postMessage. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 行 0 的 `rel=opener` 是现代浏览器中的显式 opt-in 候选；行 1、4 使用 noopener，行 5 的 noreferrer 蕴含 noopener；行 2、3 虽无 noopener，但现代 `_blank` 仍隐式隔离，只有旧浏览器可作为兼容性例外。新标签打开成功不是 reverse tabnabbing 阳性。
analysis.en: Line 0 with `rel=opener` is the explicit modern opt-in candidate; lines 1 and 4 use noopener, and noreferrer on line 5 implies noopener. Lines 2 and 3 omit it but modern `_blank` still isolates implicitly, with legacy browsers only as compatibility exceptions. A successfully opened tab is not a reverse-tabnabbing finding.

opsecTips.zh: 目标页首次确认 opener 非空后停止，只执行跳转到本地无害标记页，不展示登录表单或采集导航数据。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the destination first confirms a non-null opener and navigate only to a local harmless marker page; do not display login forms or collect navigation data.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭所有测试标签，清理站点数据与 service worker，恢复 COOP/响应头并删除目标页的临时 opener 日志。
opsecTips.en: Close all test tabs, clear site data and service workers, restore COOP and response headers, and delete temporary opener logs on the destination.

review.rationale: 这是浏览上下文隔离/Tabnabbing 正负对照，不是 XSS。

lineSemantics.note: rel=opener explicitly requests an opener when COOP and browser policy permit it.
noopener and noreferrer suppress opener access.
nofollow does not request opener; target=_blank is implicitly noopener in modern browsers.
external does not request opener; target=_blank is implicitly noopener in modern browsers.
noopener suppresses opener access.
noreferrer also implies noopener.

name.zh: 隐藏 iframe 与透明覆盖层探针
name.en: Hidden Iframe and Transparent Overlay Probes

description.zh: 区分不可交互的隐藏/零尺寸 iframe 与可覆盖页面的透明 iframe，验证嵌入内容和点击转移，而非错误称为 Tabnabbing。
description.en: Distinguishes noninteractive hidden or zero-size iframes from a transparent page-covering iframe to test embedding and click redirection rather than mislabeling it as tabnabbing.

prerequisites.zh: 页面允许插入 iframe，且 CSP frame-src、目标 X-Frame-Options/CSP frame-ancestors 与 sandbox 状态已记录。
prerequisites.en: The page permits iframe insertion and CSP frame-src, destination X-Frame-Options or frame-ancestors, and sandbox state are recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 目标 iframe 指向受控页面，页面仅记录是否加载及一次测试点击，不包含真实认证或敏感操作。
prerequisites.en: The iframe targets a controlled page that records only load state and one test click, with no real authentication or sensitive action.

overview.zh: 隐藏 iframe 与透明覆盖层探针聚焦前三行都不创建新标签或 opener：display:none 与零尺寸是加载负对照，透明全页 iframe 才可能形成 UI 覆盖。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Hidden Iframe and Transparent Overlay Probes focuses on this boundary: None of the three lines creates a new tab or opener: display:none and zero size are load controls, while a transparent full-page iframe may create a UI overlay. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 风险来自透明跨层元素拦截用户点击或不受信页面被嵌入，不来自反向 Tabnabbing 的 opener 导航。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: Risk comes from a transparent layered element intercepting clicks or untrusted embedding, not from reverse-tabnabbing opener navigation. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 依次观察 iframe 是否加载、是否参与命中测试与是否接收受控点击，并比较隐藏、零尺寸和透明全屏样式。 只有第三种布局实际覆盖目标控件并把测试点击交给 iframe 才是 UI redress 阳性；后台加载或不可见 iframe 存在不等于点击劫持。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Observe iframe loading, hit testing, and receipt of one controlled click for hidden, zero-size, and transparent full-page styles. Only a layout that actually covers a target control and delivers the test click to the iframe is a UI-redress finding; background loading or iframe presence alone is not clickjacking. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 限制可嵌入来源，使用 frame-ancestors/X-Frame-Options，避免不受信 HTML 注入并对关键动作进行明确确认。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Restrict embedding origins with frame-ancestors or X-Frame-Options, prevent untrusted HTML injection, and require explicit confirmation for sensitive actions. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认iframe 嵌入与透明覆盖前置条件
title.en: Confirm Iframe Embedding and Transparent Overlay prerequisites

description.zh: 前三行都不创建新标签或 opener：display:none 与零尺寸是加载负对照，透明全页 iframe 才可能形成 UI 覆盖。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: None of the three lines creates a new tab or opener: display:none and zero size are load controls, while a transparent full-page iframe may create a UI overlay. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控iframe 嵌入与透明覆盖对照
title.en: Run a controlled Iframe Embedding and Transparent Overlay comparison

description.zh: 依次观察 iframe 是否加载、是否参与命中测试与是否接收受控点击，并比较隐藏、零尺寸和透明全屏样式。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Observe iframe loading, hit testing, and receipt of one controlled click for hidden, zero-size, and transparent full-page styles. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对iframe 嵌入与透明覆盖阳性边界
title.en: Verify Iframe Embedding and Transparent Overlay positive boundaries

description.zh: 只有第三种布局实际覆盖目标控件并把测试点击交给 iframe 才是 UI redress 阳性；后台加载或不可见 iframe 存在不等于点击劫持。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Only a layout that actually covers a target control and delivers the test click to the iframe is a UI-redress finding; background loading or iframe presence alone is not clickjacking. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归iframe 嵌入与透明覆盖
title.en: Remediate and regress Iframe Embedding and Transparent Overlay

description.zh: 限制可嵌入来源，使用 frame-ancestors/X-Frame-Options，避免不受信 HTML 注入并对关键动作进行明确确认。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Restrict embedding origins with frame-ancestors or X-Frame-Options, prevent untrusted HTML injection, and require explicit confirmation for sensitive actions. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 行 0 `display:none` 和行 1 零尺寸不会提供可点击表面，只能证明资源加载；行 2 的透明绝对定位覆盖需同时满足层级、尺寸与 pointer hit-testing 才可能是点击劫持。三者均没有 `_blank` 或 opener，因此不能报告 Tabnabbing。
analysis.en: Line 0 with display:none and line 1 at zero size provide no clickable surface and prove only loading. The transparent absolute overlay on line 2 is clickjacking only if stacking, dimensions, and pointer hit testing align. None has `_blank` or an opener, so none supports a tabnabbing report.

opsecTips.zh: 透明覆盖首次接收到测试点击后停止，不覆盖真实支付、管理或登录控件，也不诱导其他用户操作。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the transparent overlay receives one test click; do not cover real payment, administration, or login controls or involve other users.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试 iframe 与 CSS，清理受控目标的点击日志，关闭页面并恢复 CSP/frame-ancestors 配置。
opsecTips.en: Remove the test iframe and CSS, clear controlled-target click logs, close the page, and restore CSP or frame-ancestors configuration.

review.rationale: 内容测试 iframe 嵌入/透明覆盖，不包含 opener，不能归 XSS 或 Tabnabbing。

lineSemantics.note: display:none removes the iframe from interaction.
zero dimensions provide no practical click target.
a transparent full-page iframe can be a UI-redress surface only if it receives pointer events above real controls.

name.zh: 图像映射 area 的 _blank 隔离对照

description.zh: 使用 area 元素打开新浏览上下文，验证现代浏览器对 target=_blank 的隐式 noopener；该片段本身不是 XSS。
description.en: Uses an area element to open a new browsing context and verify modern implicit noopener for target=_blank; the snippet itself is not XSS.

subCategory.zh: area 链接 opener 隔离

prerequisites.zh: 完整 map/area/img 片段在当前浏览器可点击，图像与目标页均由授权测试环境托管。
prerequisites.en: The complete map, area, and img snippet is clickable in the current browser, and both image and destination are hosted in the authorized test environment.

prerequisites.zh: 记录浏览器版本、COOP 与目标页 opener 布尔值，不依赖肉眼判断新标签页。
prerequisites.en: Record browser version, COOP, and the destination's opener Boolean rather than visually inferring behavior from a new tab.

overview.zh: 图像映射 area 的 _blank 隔离对照聚焦area 的 target=_blank 与普通链接一样创建新上下文，但现代规范将其视为隐式 noopener，未显式 rel=opener 时应为负对照。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Image-Map area _blank Isolation Control focuses on this boundary: An area with target=_blank creates a new context like a normal link, but modern behavior is implicit noopener, making this a negative control without explicit rel=opener. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 只有目标页持有非空 opener 时才存在反向导航风险；图像映射、矩形坐标和新标签本身不构成漏洞。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: Reverse-navigation risk exists only if the destination retains a non-null opener; image maps, rectangle coordinates, and a new tab alone are not vulnerabilities. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 点击唯一受控 area，目标页报告 opener 是否为 null，再与显式 rel=opener 的单独基线比较。 现代浏览器中预期证据是 opener 为 null；只有旧实现或显式 opt-in 产生非空 opener 并允许受控导航才是阳性。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Click the single controlled area, have the destination report whether opener is null, and compare it with a separate explicit rel=opener baseline. The expected modern result is a null opener; only a legacy implementation or explicit opt-in producing a non-null opener with controlled navigation is positive. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 保持隐式/显式 noopener，必要时添加 noreferrer 与 COOP；不要为不受信 area 目标启用 rel=opener。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Keep implicit or explicit noopener, add noreferrer and COOP where appropriate, and never opt untrusted area destinations into opener access. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认area 链接 opener 隔离前置条件
title.en: Confirm area-Link Opener Isolation prerequisites

description.zh: area 的 target=_blank 与普通链接一样创建新上下文，但现代规范将其视为隐式 noopener，未显式 rel=opener 时应为负对照。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: An area with target=_blank creates a new context like a normal link, but modern behavior is implicit noopener, making this a negative control without explicit rel=opener. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控area 链接 opener 隔离对照
title.en: Run a controlled area-Link Opener Isolation comparison

description.zh: 点击唯一受控 area，目标页报告 opener 是否为 null，再与显式 rel=opener 的单独基线比较。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Click the single controlled area, have the destination report whether opener is null, and compare it with a separate explicit rel=opener baseline. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对area 链接 opener 隔离阳性边界
title.en: Verify area-Link Opener Isolation positive boundaries

description.zh: 现代浏览器中预期证据是 opener 为 null；只有旧实现或显式 opt-in 产生非空 opener 并允许受控导航才是阳性。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: The expected modern result is a null opener; only a legacy implementation or explicit opt-in producing a non-null opener with controlled navigation is positive. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归area 链接 opener 隔离
title.en: Remediate and regress area-Link Opener Isolation

description.zh: 保持隐式/显式 noopener，必要时添加 noreferrer 与 COOP；不要为不受信 area 目标启用 rel=opener。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Keep implicit or explicit noopener, add noreferrer and COOP where appropriate, and never opt untrusted area destinations into opener access. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 该四行 HTML 是一个完整图像映射，而不是四个独立 Payload。`area target=_blank` 在现代 HTML 行为下隐式 noopener，因此应作为兼容性负对照；仅打开新标签页、图片可点击或 href 导航成功都不是 reverse tabnabbing。
analysis.en: The four HTML lines form one image map rather than four independent payloads. An `area target=_blank` has implicit noopener in modern HTML behavior and is therefore a compatibility negative control; a new tab, clickable image, or successful href navigation is not reverse tabnabbing.

opsecTips.zh: 完成一次受控点击并确认 opener 状态后停止，不把 area 指向钓鱼页或真实业务页面。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one controlled click confirms opener state and do not point the area to phishing or real business pages.

opsecTips.zh: 删除 map/area 测试片段、图片和目标页日志，关闭新标签并清除站点存储。
opsecTips.en: Delete the map and area snippet, image, and destination logs, close the new tab, and clear site storage.

review.rationale: 现代 area `_blank` 是 opener 隔离负对照，属于浏览上下文安全而非 XSS。

name.zh: WebSocket 消息 DOM XSS 探针

description.zh: 在 type=message 与 action=sendMessage 两种 JSON 信封中放置 HTML 事件处理器，验证 WebSocket 消息是否进入不安全 DOM sink。
description.en: Places HTML event-handler strings in type=message and action=sendMessage JSON envelopes to test whether WebSocket content reaches an unsafe DOM sink.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认应用接受其中一种 JSON 信封，并能定位消息从 WebSocket 处理器到 DOM 渲染 API 的数据流。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the application accepts one JSON envelope and trace data from the WebSocket handler to the DOM rendering API.

prerequisites.zh: 测试浏览器使用隔离账号与 CSP/控制台日志，执行标记只设置本地布尔值，不调用外部网络。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated account with CSP and console logging, and make the execution marker set only a local Boolean without external network calls.

overview.zh: WebSocket 消息 DOM XSS 探针聚焦20 行覆盖两个消息 schema 与多种 HTML 事件上下文，目标是 DOM/存储型 XSS，不是 WebSocket 协议本身的漏洞。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Message DOM-XSS Probes focuses on this boundary: The 20 lines cover two message schemas and several HTML event contexts, targeting DOM or stored XSS rather than a flaw in the WebSocket protocol itself. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 服务端或客户端将消息内容作为 HTML 写入 innerHTML 等 sink，未按 HTML 上下文编码或消毒。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: The server or client writes message content into an HTML sink such as innerHTML without context-aware encoding or sanitization. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先发送纯文本标记确认字段映射，再选择一个与实际 sink 匹配的无网络事件载荷，并与转义文本对照。 阳性要求目标浏览器在消息渲染后执行本地标记，且 DevTools 证明来源为该 WebSocket 数据；JSON 回显或消息 ACK 不足。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Send a plaintext marker to map the field, then choose one networkless event payload matching the actual sink and compare it with escaped text. Positive evidence requires the target browser to execute the local marker after rendering, with DevTools tracing it to the WebSocket data; JSON reflection or a message acknowledgment is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对消息 schema 做严格验证，默认使用 textContent，富文本通过维护的消毒器和 CSP 处理，并在存储与回放路径一致编码。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Validate the message schema strictly, default to textContent, sanitize allowed rich text with a maintained library and CSP, and encode consistently during storage and replay. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 消息到 DOM sink前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Message-to-DOM Sink prerequisites

description.zh: 20 行覆盖两个消息 schema 与多种 HTML 事件上下文，目标是 DOM/存储型 XSS，不是 WebSocket 协议本身的漏洞。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 20 lines cover two message schemas and several HTML event contexts, targeting DOM or stored XSS rather than a flaw in the WebSocket protocol itself. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 消息到 DOM sink对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Message-to-DOM Sink comparison

description.zh: 先发送纯文本标记确认字段映射，再选择一个与实际 sink 匹配的无网络事件载荷，并与转义文本对照。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Send a plaintext marker to map the field, then choose one networkless event payload matching the actual sink and compare it with escaped text. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 消息到 DOM sink阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Message-to-DOM Sink positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性要求目标浏览器在消息渲染后执行本地标记，且 DevTools 证明来源为该 WebSocket 数据；JSON 回显或消息 ACK 不足。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires the target browser to execute the local marker after rendering, with DevTools tracing it to the WebSocket data; JSON reflection or a message acknowledgment is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 消息到 DOM sink
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Message-to-DOM Sink

description.zh: 对消息 schema 做严格验证，默认使用 textContent，富文本通过维护的消毒器和 CSP 处理，并在存储与回放路径一致编码。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Validate the message schema strictly, default to textContent, sanitize allowed rich text with a maintained library and CSP, and encode consistently during storage and replay. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 两组字段名只是到达 sink 的不同业务信封；是否 XSS 取决于最终 HTML 解析，而不是 WebSocket 帧被接受。`alert(1)` 字样出现在聊天记录、服务器 JSON 或日志中是假阳性；必须看到浏览器执行并排除扩展注入。
analysis.en: The two field families are business envelopes to the same class of sink; XSS depends on final HTML parsing, not acceptance of a WebSocket frame. `alert(1)` appearing in chat history, server JSON, or logs is false positive; browser execution must be observed after excluding extensions.

opsecTips.zh: 首个本地布尔标记执行后停止，不测试 Cookie 读取、外部 fetch、持久消息批量传播或其他用户账号。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first local Boolean marker executes; do not test cookie reads, external fetches, bulk persistent propagation, or other users.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试消息和存储记录，清理浏览器缓存/service worker，关闭套接字并确认没有重连队列继续回放载荷。
opsecTips.en: Delete test messages and stored records, clear browser cache and service workers, close the socket, and verify no reconnect queue replays the payload.

review.rationale: 消息内容是 XSS sink 探针，应保留在 XSS 分类并与协议握手问题分离。

name.zh: WebSocket 消息到 OS 命令注入

description.zh: 在两种 WebSocket JSON 信封的内容字段中放置 Shell 分隔符与命令，验证后端是否把消息拼入操作系统命令。
description.en: Places shell separators and commands in two WebSocket JSON envelope fields to test whether the backend concatenates message content into an operating-system command.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认消息由服务器处理而非仅客户端渲染，并能观察 WebSocket 请求到后端子进程的父子关系。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the server processes the message rather than only rendering it client-side, and observe parentage from the WebSocket request to backend child processes.

prerequisites.zh: 将原始 id/whoami/cat/ls 替换为只输出唯一令牌的无害命令，测试账号无文件和网络高权限。
prerequisites.en: Replace source id, whoami, cat, and ls commands with a harmless unique-token command, and use an account without privileged file or network access.

overview.zh: WebSocket 消息到 OS 命令注入聚焦24 行按 type/message 与 action/sendMessage 信封覆盖 `|`、`;`、`||`、`&&`，属于后端命令注入而不是 XSS。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Message-to-OS Command Injection focuses on this boundary: The 24 lines cover `|`, `;`, `||`, and `&&` across type/message and action/sendMessage envelopes and target backend command injection rather than XSS. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: WebSocket 消息内容被拼入 Shell 字符串或 shell=true 子进程，分隔符因此改变后端命令结构。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: WebSocket message content is concatenated into a shell string or shell-enabled child process, allowing separators to alter backend command structure. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 用普通文本和同闭合的无害分隔符标记形成对照，一次只测试一个信封与分隔符并关联进程审计。 阳性是 WebSocket 请求派生第二个标记进程；服务器回显字符串、消息发送成功、客户端控制台执行或后端返回通用错误都是假阳性。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Use plaintext and a harmless separator marker with identical closure as controls, testing one envelope and separator at a time with process-audit correlation. Positive evidence is a second marker process derived from the WebSocket request; server reflection, successful sending, client-console execution, or a generic backend error is false positive. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 使用固定程序与 argv，不将消息送入 Shell；对 schema、类型和枚举动作严格允许列表，并限制 worker 子进程权限。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Use a fixed executable and argv without a shell, strictly allowlist schema, types, and actions, and restrict worker child-process privileges. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 后端命令 sink前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Backend Command Sink prerequisites

description.zh: 24 行按 type/message 与 action/sendMessage 信封覆盖 `|`、`;`、`||`、`&&`，属于后端命令注入而不是 XSS。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 24 lines cover `|`, `;`, `||`, and `&&` across type/message and action/sendMessage envelopes and target backend command injection rather than XSS. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 后端命令 sink对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Backend Command Sink comparison

description.zh: 用普通文本和同闭合的无害分隔符标记形成对照，一次只测试一个信封与分隔符并关联进程审计。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Use plaintext and a harmless separator marker with identical closure as controls, testing one envelope and separator at a time with process-audit correlation. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 后端命令 sink阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Backend Command Sink positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性是 WebSocket 请求派生第二个标记进程；服务器回显字符串、消息发送成功、客户端控制台执行或后端返回通用错误都是假阳性。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence is a second marker process derived from the WebSocket request; server reflection, successful sending, client-console execution, or a generic backend error is false positive. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 后端命令 sink
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Backend Command Sink

description.zh: 使用固定程序与 argv，不将消息送入 Shell；对 schema、类型和枚举动作严格允许列表，并限制 worker 子进程权限。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Use a fixed executable and argv without a shell, strictly allowlist schema, types, and actions, and restrict worker child-process privileges. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 该条的危险边界位于 WebSocket 消息消费者到 OS Shell，而非浏览器。每个原始命令都可能读取主机信息或文件，验证时不得直接运行；只有进程树与唯一标记可确认 RCE，消息 ACK、断连或过滤器告警均不能。
analysis.en: The dangerous boundary is between the WebSocket consumer and an OS shell, not the browser. Every source command could expose host or file data and must not be run for validation; only process ancestry and a unique marker confirm RCE, while acknowledgments, disconnects, or filter alerts do not.

opsecTips.zh: 首次生成受控标记子进程后停止，不继续执行 whoami、读取 `/flag`、列目录或建立反向连接。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first controlled marker child process and do not continue with whoami, `/flag` reads, directory listing, or reverse connections.

opsecTips.zh: 终止测试 worker/子进程，删除标记和消息记录，关闭 WebSocket 并确认自动重连不会再次发送命令。
opsecTips.en: Terminate test workers and child processes, delete markers and message records, close the WebSocket, and verify automatic reconnect does not resend commands.

review.rationale: 这是 WebSocket 到后端 Shell 的 RCE Payload，不能挂在 XSS。

name.zh: WebSocket 消息 SQL 注入

description.zh: 在 type/message 与 action/sendMessage 信封中测试布尔、UNION 和时间条件，验证消息字段是否拼入数据库查询。
description.en: Tests Boolean, UNION, and timing predicates in type/message and action/sendMessage envelopes to determine whether a message field is concatenated into a database query.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认 WebSocket 消息触发服务器数据库访问，并能关联消息 ID、最终参数化/拼接查询与数据库日志。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that the WebSocket message triggers server-side database access and correlate message ID, final bound or concatenated query, and database logs.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离测试表和固定记录，时间探针延时缩短且有正常/恒假统计对照。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated test table with fixed rows and short timing probes with normal and false statistical controls.

overview.zh: WebSocket 消息 SQL 注入聚焦16 行覆盖两个信封中的布尔、UNION 列数与 MySQL 时间条件，真实类别是 SQL 注入。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Message SQL Injection focuses on this boundary: The 16 lines cover Boolean, UNION column counts, and MySQL timing conditions in two envelopes and belong to SQL injection. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 消息字段未经类型约束与参数绑定就拼入 SQL，WebSocket 传输层不会自动提供数据库安全。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: A message field is concatenated into SQL without type constraints or parameter binding; WebSocket transport provides no database safety. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先用普通文本和真假条件比较固定记录，再按已识别 DBMS 选择一个 UNION 或短时间探针，避免混用方言。 查询结果、数据库审计或统计延时必须与条件对应；消息 ACK、连接关闭、SQL 字样回显或单次慢响应不构成注入。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Compare plaintext and true or false predicates against fixed rows, then choose one UNION or short timing probe for the identified DBMS without mixing dialects. Query results, database audit, or statistical timing must track the condition; an acknowledgment, disconnect, reflected SQL text, or one slow response is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对消息 schema 做类型验证并使用预编译参数，动态标识符映射允许列表，限制数据库账户并统一错误。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Validate message types and use prepared parameters, map dynamic identifiers to allowlists, restrict the database account, and normalize errors. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 数据库查询 sink前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Database Query Sink prerequisites

description.zh: 16 行覆盖两个信封中的布尔、UNION 列数与 MySQL 时间条件，真实类别是 SQL 注入。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 16 lines cover Boolean, UNION column counts, and MySQL timing conditions in two envelopes and belong to SQL injection. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 数据库查询 sink对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Database Query Sink comparison

description.zh: 先用普通文本和真假条件比较固定记录，再按已识别 DBMS 选择一个 UNION 或短时间探针，避免混用方言。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Compare plaintext and true or false predicates against fixed rows, then choose one UNION or short timing probe for the identified DBMS without mixing dialects. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 数据库查询 sink阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Database Query Sink positive boundaries

description.zh: 查询结果、数据库审计或统计延时必须与条件对应；消息 ACK、连接关闭、SQL 字样回显或单次慢响应不构成注入。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Query results, database audit, or statistical timing must track the condition; an acknowledgment, disconnect, reflected SQL text, or one slow response is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 数据库查询 sink
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Database Query Sink

description.zh: 对消息 schema 做类型验证并使用预编译参数，动态标识符映射允许列表，限制数据库账户并统一错误。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Validate message types and use prepared parameters, map dynamic identifiers to allowlists, restrict the database account, and normalize errors. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: type 与 action 信封只是到达查询 sink 的两种路由。只有恒真/恒假结果差异、列结构标记或可重复时间信号与最终 SQL 一致才是阳性；数据库返回语法错误、聊天内容包含引号或网关阻断都可能是假阳性。
analysis.en: The type and action envelopes are only routes to the query sink. Positive evidence requires true or false result differences, a reflected column marker, or repeatable timing aligned with final SQL; database syntax errors, quotes in chat content, or gateway blocking can all be false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 获得一个固定测试记录或短延时证据后停止，不读取用户表、系统目录或扩大时间/请求次数。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one fixed test-row or short-delay proof and do not read user tables or catalogs or increase timing and request volume.

opsecTips.zh: 删除测试消息与数据库标记行，结束连接，清理慢查询/审计中的敏感文本并确认无重试。
opsecTips.en: Delete test messages and marker rows, close the connection, sanitize sensitive text from slow-query or audit logs, and verify no retries remain.

review.rationale: 消息字段进入数据库查询，真实分类是 SQL 注入而非 XSS。

name.zh: 跨站 WebSocket 劫持的 Origin 校验
name.en: Origin Validation for Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking

description.zh: 测试 WebSocket 握手是否严格校验浏览器 Origin，并确认跨站页面能否借自动携带的会话凭据建立有权限连接。
description.en: Tests strict Origin validation during a WebSocket handshake and whether a cross-site page can establish an authorized connection using automatically attached session credentials.

prerequisites.zh: 目标 WebSocket 使用 Cookie 或浏览器自动携带的凭据，测试账号与跨站测试源均受控。
prerequisites.en: The target WebSocket uses cookies or other browser-attached credentials, and both the test account and cross-site origin are controlled.

prerequisites.zh: 可记录实际浏览器发送的 Origin、握手状态、会话主体和一项无副作用授权动作。
prerequisites.en: Record the browser-generated Origin, handshake status, session principal, and one side-effect-free authorized action.

overview.zh: 跨站 WebSocket 劫持的 Origin 校验聚焦20 行是手工 Origin 解析变体；浏览器脚本不能任意设置 Origin，因此测试需区分代理重放与真实跨站浏览器条件。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Origin Validation for Cross-Site WebSocket Hijacking focuses on this boundary: The 20 lines are manual Origin parser variants; browser script cannot arbitrarily set Origin, so proxy replay must be distinguished from a real cross-site browser condition. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 服务器依赖 Cookie 认证却不验证 Origin 或用后缀/子串错误匹配，攻击者页面可借受害者会话打开连接。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: The server relies on cookie authentication without validating Origin or uses flawed suffix or substring matching, allowing an attacker page to open a socket with the victim session. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先从真实跨站页面发起握手，观察浏览器 Origin；仅在解析单元测试中逐个使用 null、端口、编码和相似域变体。 阳性要求跨站浏览器连接被接受、会话身份有效且可执行/读取一项受控授权操作；101 响应或变造 Origin 被代理接受不够。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Initiate a handshake from a real cross-site page and observe the browser Origin, using null, port, encoding, and lookalike variants only in parser-focused tests. Positive evidence requires an accepted cross-site browser socket with a valid session that can perform or read one controlled authorized operation; a 101 response or proxy-forged Origin alone is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对规范化后的 scheme/host/port 做精确 Origin 允许列表，拒绝 null/缺失来源，使用 SameSite/CSRF 设计与消息级授权。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Use an exact allowlist over canonical scheme, host, and port, reject null or absent origins, and combine SameSite or CSRF design with message-level authorization. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认CSWSH Origin 校验前置条件
title.en: Confirm CSWSH Origin Validation prerequisites

description.zh: 20 行是手工 Origin 解析变体；浏览器脚本不能任意设置 Origin，因此测试需区分代理重放与真实跨站浏览器条件。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 20 lines are manual Origin parser variants; browser script cannot arbitrarily set Origin, so proxy replay must be distinguished from a real cross-site browser condition. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控CSWSH Origin 校验对照
title.en: Run a controlled CSWSH Origin Validation comparison

description.zh: 先从真实跨站页面发起握手，观察浏览器 Origin；仅在解析单元测试中逐个使用 null、端口、编码和相似域变体。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Initiate a handshake from a real cross-site page and observe the browser Origin, using null, port, encoding, and lookalike variants only in parser-focused tests. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
Origin: null
Origin: https://target.com.evil.com
Origin: https://evil.com%09target.com
Origin: https://evil.com%00target.com
Origin: https://evil.com%0d%0atarget.com
Origin: https://evil.com.target.com
Origin: https://target.com:443
Origin: https://target.com:8080
Origin: https://target.com:8443
Origin: https://target.com/
Origin: https://target.com%2f
Origin: https://target.com%252f
Origin: https://target.com%23evil.com
Origin: https://target.com#evil.com
Origin: https://target.com\evil.com
Origin: https://target.com%5cevil.com
Origin: http://target.com
Origin: ws://target.com
Origin: wss://target.com
Origin:

title.zh: 核对CSWSH Origin 校验阳性边界
title.en: Verify CSWSH Origin Validation positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性要求跨站浏览器连接被接受、会话身份有效且可执行/读取一项受控授权操作；101 响应或变造 Origin 被代理接受不够。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires an accepted cross-site browser socket with a valid session that can perform or read one controlled authorized operation; a 101 response or proxy-forged Origin alone is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归CSWSH Origin 校验
title.en: Remediate and regress CSWSH Origin Validation

description.zh: 对规范化后的 scheme/host/port 做精确 Origin 允许列表，拒绝 null/缺失来源，使用 SameSite/CSRF 设计与消息级授权。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Use an exact allowlist over canonical scheme, host, and port, reject null or absent origins, and combine SameSite or CSRF design with message-level authorization. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: `Origin: null` 可能来自 sandbox/file 环境但不应默认信任；相似域、编码斜杠、反斜杠、端口和空 Origin 用于发现错误字符串匹配。只有浏览器可产生的恶意 Origin 在携带测试会话时获授权才是 CSWSH，手工客户端可设置任意头会产生假阳性。
analysis.en: `Origin: null` can arise from sandbox or file contexts but should not be trusted by default. Lookalike domains, encoded slashes, backslashes, ports, and empty Origin probe flawed string matching. CSWSH requires a browser-producible hostile Origin to gain authorization with the test session; arbitrary headers from a manual client create false positives.

opsecTips.zh: 跨站页面首次读取一项无敏感标记后停止，不发送状态修改消息、导出聊天记录或使用他人会话。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the cross-site page reads one nonsensitive marker and do not send state-changing messages, export chat history, or use another user's session.

opsecTips.zh: 注销测试会话，关闭两端 WebSocket，删除跨站页面与消息，清理 Cookie、站点数据和握手日志中的令牌。
opsecTips.en: Log out the test session, close both sockets, delete the cross-site page and messages, and clear cookies, site data, and tokens from handshake logs.

review.rationale: CSWSH 是会话型跨站请求伪造/授权问题，不是 XSS。

name.zh: WebSocket 握手 Host 与 Origin 路由校验
name.en: WebSocket Handshake Host and Origin Routing Validation

description.zh: 测试握手阶段 Host、标准 Origin 与旧式 Sec-WebSocket-Origin 的解析和路由边界，验证虚拟主机与来源策略是否一致。
description.en: Tests parsing and routing boundaries for Host, standard Origin, and legacy Sec-WebSocket-Origin during the handshake to validate virtual-host and origin policy consistency.

prerequisites.zh: 已记录反向代理、负载均衡器和应用各自处理 Host/Origin 的规则与允许端口。
prerequisites.en: Record how the reverse proxy, load balancer, and application process Host and Origin and which ports are allowed.

prerequisites.zh: 使用受控虚拟主机和测试账号，可关联外层 HTTP Upgrade 与最终 WebSocket 服务实例。
prerequisites.en: Use a controlled virtual host and test account and correlate the outer HTTP Upgrade with the final WebSocket service instance.

overview.zh: WebSocket 握手 Host 与 Origin 路由校验聚焦八行混合 Host 与已废弃草案头 Sec-WebSocket-Origin；RFC 6455 浏览器使用标准 Origin，二者不能互相替代。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Handshake Host and Origin Routing Validation focuses on this boundary: The eight lines mix Host with the legacy draft header Sec-WebSocket-Origin; RFC 6455 browsers use standard Origin, so the headers are not interchangeable. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 代理按 Host 路由而应用按另一头校验，或服务信任客户端可伪造的旧式头，可能造成跨虚拟主机连接与策略绕过。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: A proxy may route by Host while the application validates another header, or a service may trust a forgeable legacy header, causing cross-virtual-host connections and policy bypass. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 对真实浏览器握手记录标准头，再由协议客户端分别改变 Host 和旧式头，一次只修改一个字段并核对路由目标。 阳性要求请求被路由到非预期服务且获得不应有的会话/消息权限；101、不同证书错误或旧头被忽略都不足。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Record standard headers from a real browser handshake, then change Host and the legacy header separately with a protocol client while checking the routed destination. Positive evidence requires routing to an unintended service with unauthorized session or message capability; a 101 response, certificate error difference, or ignored legacy header is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 代理和应用使用一致的规范 Host/Origin 允许列表，绑定 Upgrade 到预期虚拟主机，忽略旧式头并在消息层重新授权。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Use consistent canonical Host and Origin allowlists across proxy and application, bind Upgrade to the intended virtual host, ignore legacy headers, and authorize again at message level. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 握手路由前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Handshake Routing prerequisites

description.zh: 八行混合 Host 与已废弃草案头 Sec-WebSocket-Origin；RFC 6455 浏览器使用标准 Origin，二者不能互相替代。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The eight lines mix Host with the legacy draft header Sec-WebSocket-Origin; RFC 6455 browsers use standard Origin, so the headers are not interchangeable. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 握手路由对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Handshake Routing comparison

description.zh: 对真实浏览器握手记录标准头，再由协议客户端分别改变 Host 和旧式头，一次只修改一个字段并核对路由目标。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Record standard headers from a real browser handshake, then change Host and the legacy header separately with a protocol client while checking the routed destination. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
Host: target.com:443
Host: target.com:80
Host: target.com:8080
Host: target.com.evil.com
Host: null
Sec-WebSocket-Origin: https://evil.com
Sec-WebSocket-Origin: null
Sec-WebSocket-Origin: https://target.com.evil.com

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 握手路由阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Handshake Routing positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性要求请求被路由到非预期服务且获得不应有的会话/消息权限；101、不同证书错误或旧头被忽略都不足。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires routing to an unintended service with unauthorized session or message capability; a 101 response, certificate error difference, or ignored legacy header is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 握手路由
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Handshake Routing

description.zh: 代理和应用使用一致的规范 Host/Origin 允许列表，绑定 Upgrade 到预期虚拟主机，忽略旧式头并在消息层重新授权。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Use consistent canonical Host and Origin allowlists across proxy and application, bind Upgrade to the intended virtual host, ignore legacy headers, and authorize again at message level. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: Host 控制连接路由，Origin 表示脚本来源；`Sec-WebSocket-Origin` 来自早期草案且不应作为现代安全信号。手工客户端可以伪造这些头，所以只有跨层解析差异导致错误服务和权限才是阳性；单一头被接受或端口响应不同是假阳性。
analysis.en: Host controls connection routing while Origin represents script origin; `Sec-WebSocket-Origin` is from an early draft and should not be a modern security signal. Manual clients can forge these headers, so only cross-layer parsing that reaches the wrong service and privilege is positive; acceptance of one header or different port responses is false positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认路由到受控错误虚拟主机后停止，不连接生产后台、管理端口或其他租户。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first controlled misrouting to a test virtual host and do not connect to production backends, management ports, or other tenants.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试套接字，恢复代理 Host 映射和证书配置，删除握手样例并清空连接池。
opsecTips.en: Close test sockets, restore proxy Host mappings and certificate configuration, delete handshake samples, and drain connection pools.

review.rationale: 这是 HTTP Upgrade/虚拟主机握手安全，真实分类为 API/WebSocket 协议而非 XSS。

name.zh: WebSocket 富文本 XSS 上下文探针

description.zh: 覆盖 chat/send/message/data 信封、交互事件、SVG/data URL 与高风险外传样例，验证 WebSocket 富文本在不同 DOM 上下文的编码。
description.en: Covers chat, send, message, and data envelopes plus interactive events, SVG, data URLs, and high-risk exfiltration samples to test context-specific encoding of WebSocket rich text.

subCategory.zh: WebSocket 富文本上下文 XSS

prerequisites.zh: 已识别实际支持的消息 schema 与最终 HTML、属性、URL 或 SVG sink，其他信封仅作为负对照。
prerequisites.en: Identify the supported message schema and final HTML, attribute, URL, or SVG sink; treat unsupported envelopes as negative controls.

prerequisites.zh: 隔离账号和浏览器禁止外部网络，所有 alert/fetch/sendBeacon 原始动作改为本地无害执行标记。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated account and networkless browser and replace source alert, fetch, and sendBeacon actions with a harmless local execution marker.

overview.zh: WebSocket 富文本 XSS 上下文探针聚焦24 行比基础 WebSocket XSS 卡增加链接/交互/SVG/data 与 Cookie 外传形式，必须按最终输出上下文选择，不能批量投递。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Rich-Text XSS Context Probes focuses on this boundary: The 24 lines add links, interaction events, SVG, data URLs, and cookie-exfiltration forms beyond basic WebSocket XSS and must be selected by final output context rather than sent in bulk. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 消息在存储、广播或客户端重放时进入与其编码不匹配的富文本 sink，允许事件属性、危险 URL 或 SVG 脚本执行。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: Messages enter a rich-text sink with mismatched encoding during storage, broadcast, or client replay, allowing event attributes, dangerous URLs, or SVG script execution. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先用纯文本定位上下文，只选择一个无网络标记变体并与消毒/编码对照，分别观察发送端和接收端。 阳性是接收浏览器在对应 sink 执行本地标记；Cookie URL 出现在日志、CSP 阻断报告、HTML 被显示为文本或外部请求失败都不是成功。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Locate the context with plaintext, select one networkless marker variant with a sanitized or encoded control, and observe sender and receiver separately. Positive evidence is local marker execution in the matching sink on the receiving browser; cookie URLs in logs, CSP reports, HTML shown as text, or failed external requests are not success. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对每个字段执行 context-aware 编码，富文本采用严格允许列表消毒，拒绝 javascript/data 协议并部署无 unsafe-inline 的 CSP。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Apply context-aware encoding per field, sanitize rich text with a strict allowlist, reject javascript and data schemes, and deploy CSP without unsafe-inline. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 富文本上下文 XSS前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Rich-Text Context XSS prerequisites

description.zh: 24 行比基础 WebSocket XSS 卡增加链接/交互/SVG/data 与 Cookie 外传形式，必须按最终输出上下文选择，不能批量投递。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 24 lines add links, interaction events, SVG, data URLs, and cookie-exfiltration forms beyond basic WebSocket XSS and must be selected by final output context rather than sent in bulk. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 富文本上下文 XSS对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Rich-Text Context XSS comparison

description.zh: 先用纯文本定位上下文，只选择一个无网络标记变体并与消毒/编码对照，分别观察发送端和接收端。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Locate the context with plaintext, select one networkless marker variant with a sanitized or encoded control, and observe sender and receiver separately. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 富文本上下文 XSS阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Rich-Text Context XSS positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性是接收浏览器在对应 sink 执行本地标记；Cookie URL 出现在日志、CSP 阻断报告、HTML 被显示为文本或外部请求失败都不是成功。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence is local marker execution in the matching sink on the receiving browser; cookie URLs in logs, CSP reports, HTML shown as text, or failed external requests are not success. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 富文本上下文 XSS
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Rich-Text Context XSS

description.zh: 对每个字段执行 context-aware 编码，富文本采用严格允许列表消毒，拒绝 javascript/data 协议并部署无 unsafe-inline 的 CSP。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Apply context-aware encoding per field, sanitize rich text with a strict allowlist, reject javascript and data schemes, and deploy CSP without unsafe-inline. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 该集合含明显高风险 Cookie 外传与 data/SVG 变体，验证不需要实际外传。消息被广播或存储只是到达条件；必须在特定接收端 sink 中执行无害标记。被 CSP 阻止、DOMPurify 删除、客户端显示转义文本或只有发送者自我执行均是假阳性/影响边界。
analysis.en: The set contains high-risk cookie-exfiltration and data or SVG variants, but validation never requires exfiltration. Broadcast or storage is only reachability; a harmless marker must execute in the specific receiving sink. CSP blocking, sanitizer removal, escaped rendering, or sender-only self-execution defines false-positive or impact boundaries.

opsecTips.zh: 一个接收端上下文执行本地标记后停止，不使用原始 Cookie 外传、sendBeacon、data URL 或跨用户批量消息。
opsecTips.en: Stop after one receiver context executes the local marker; do not use source cookie exfiltration, sendBeacon, data URLs, or cross-user bulk messages.

opsecTips.zh: 删除所有测试消息和附件，清理接收端浏览器存储/service worker，关闭连接并检查持久队列不再广播。
opsecTips.en: Delete all test messages and attachments, clear receiver storage and service workers, close connections, and verify persistent queues no longer broadcast them.

review.rationale: 这是 WebSocket 富文本到浏览器 sink 的 XSS Payload，独立于 RCE/SQLi/握手问题。

name.zh: WebSocket 驱动的服务端请求伪造

description.zh: 通过 request/fetch/proxy/url/uri/endpoint 等消息字段请求回环、元数据、file 与 gopher 目标，验证 WebSocket 后端是否代发网络或文件请求。
description.en: Uses request, fetch, proxy, url, uri, and endpoint fields for loopback, metadata, file, and gopher targets to test whether a WebSocket backend performs network or file requests.

prerequisites.zh: 已确认某个消息动作会在服务器侧获取 URL，并能区分浏览器自身请求、后端 HTTP 客户端与命令字段执行。
prerequisites.en: Confirm that a message action fetches a URL server-side and distinguish browser requests, backend HTTP clients, and command-field execution.

prerequisites.zh: 部署受控外部与回环标记服务；file、gopher 与云元数据原始目标均替换为无敏感测试资源。
prerequisites.en: Deploy controlled external and loopback marker services and replace source file, gopher, and cloud-metadata targets with nonsensitive test resources.

overview.zh: WebSocket 驱动的服务端请求伪造聚焦36 行覆盖多个业务字段和 scheme；核心分类是服务器代发请求，但 command 字段若被 Shell 执行需另按 RCE 证据判断。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket-Driven Server-Side Request Forgery focuses on this boundary: The 36 lines cover multiple business fields and schemes; the core category is server-side request dispatch, while command fields require separate RCE evidence if executed by a shell. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: WebSocket 消息中的 URL/目标未经过协议、解析后地址和重定向校验，worker 以服务器网络身份访问内部资源。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: URL or target fields in WebSocket messages lack protocol, post-resolution address, and redirect validation, allowing a worker to access internal resources with server network identity. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先用外部标记确认后端请求，再选一个回环标记 URL；逐字段测试且不触碰元数据、真实文件或 Redis。 阳性要求后端客户端/出站代理和目标服务记录同一令牌；WebSocket ACK、浏览器请求、连接超时或 command 字符串被存储都不够。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Confirm backend fetching with an external marker, then select one loopback marker URL, testing one field at a time without touching metadata, real files, or Redis. Positive evidence requires the backend client or egress proxy and target service to record the same token; a WebSocket acknowledgment, browser request, timeout, or stored command string is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对动作和字段做 schema 允许列表，仅允许 HTTPS 目标；解析后阻断内网/回环/链路本地，禁用 file/gopher，并在重定向后重检。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Allowlist actions and fields and permit only HTTPS destinations; block internal, loopback, and link-local addresses after resolution, disable file and gopher, and revalidate redirects. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 服务端请求调度前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Server-Side Request Dispatch prerequisites

description.zh: 36 行覆盖多个业务字段和 scheme；核心分类是服务器代发请求，但 command 字段若被 Shell 执行需另按 RCE 证据判断。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 36 lines cover multiple business fields and schemes; the core category is server-side request dispatch, while command fields require separate RCE evidence if executed by a shell. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 服务端请求调度对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Server-Side Request Dispatch comparison

description.zh: 先用外部标记确认后端请求，再选一个回环标记 URL；逐字段测试且不触碰元数据、真实文件或 Redis。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Confirm backend fetching with an external marker, then select one loopback marker URL, testing one field at a time without touching metadata, real files, or Redis. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 服务端请求调度阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Server-Side Request Dispatch positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性要求后端客户端/出站代理和目标服务记录同一令牌；WebSocket ACK、浏览器请求、连接超时或 command 字符串被存储都不够。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires the backend client or egress proxy and target service to record the same token; a WebSocket acknowledgment, browser request, timeout, or stored command string is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 服务端请求调度
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Server-Side Request Dispatch

description.zh: 对动作和字段做 schema 允许列表，仅允许 HTTPS 目标；解析后阻断内网/回环/链路本地，禁用 file/gopher，并在重定向后重检。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Allowlist actions and fields and permit only HTTPS destinations; block internal, loopback, and link-local addresses after resolution, disable file and gopher, and revalidate redirects. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 0-23 与 28-35 行是不同字段的 URL/scheme SSRF 候选；24-27 的 command= curl/wget 只有在服务器执行完整命令时才是命令执行路径，不能仅凭字符串报告 RCE 或 SSRF。成功必须是服务端实际出站到受控目标，file/gopher/元数据行不能作为初始证明。
analysis.en: Lines 0-23 and 28-35 are URL or scheme SSRF candidates across fields. Command lines 24-27 become command-execution paths only if the server runs the complete curl or wget command; the string alone proves neither RCE nor SSRF. Success requires actual server egress to a controlled target, and file, gopher, or metadata lines are not initial proof.

opsecTips.zh: 首次收到后端回环标记请求后停止，不访问云凭据、真实内部端口、系统文件或 Redis 命令。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the first backend request reaches the loopback marker and do not access cloud credentials, real internal ports, system files, or Redis commands.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭标记服务与 WebSocket，清除 DNS/HTTP 缓存和重试队列，删除消息及出站日志中的内部 URL。
opsecTips.en: Close marker services and the WebSocket, clear DNS and HTTP caches and retry queues, and remove internal URLs from messages and egress logs.

review.rationale: 核心行为是 WebSocket worker 代发请求，真实分类为 SSRF；command 字段边界已单独说明。

lineSemantics.note: Request, fetch, and proxy envelopes target server-side URL dispatch across HTTP, file, and gopher schemes.
curl and wget strings require independent proof of server-side command execution and must not be inferred from storage or acknowledgment.
Generic url, uri, and endpoint fields require proof that the backend consumes them as destinations.

name.zh: WebSocket 消息级认证与授权绕过
name.en: WebSocket Message-Level Authentication and Authorization Bypass

description.zh: 测试空值、类型混淆、弱凭据和会话字段是否被 WebSocket 消息处理器错误接受，并验证连接后每条消息的主体授权。
description.en: Tests whether empty values, type confusion, weak credentials, and session fields are incorrectly accepted by a WebSocket message handler and whether each message is authorized after connection.

prerequisites.zh: 使用两个权限不同的自有测试账号，记录握手认证、消息级 auth/login 状态机和服务端最终主体。
prerequisites.en: Use two owned test accounts with different privileges and record handshake authentication, message-level auth or login state, and the final server principal.

prerequisites.zh: 所有 token/session/cookie 样例替换为测试凭据；禁止使用 `STOLEN_SESSION` 或默认管理员真实口令。
prerequisites.en: Replace all token, session, and cookie samples with test credentials and never use `STOLEN_SESSION` or real default administrator passwords.

overview.zh: WebSocket 消息级认证与授权绕过聚焦22 行覆盖 token 类型、method、用户名/口令和会话字段，目标是认证状态机与消息授权，不是 XSS。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Message-Level Authentication and Authorization Bypass focuses on this boundary: The 22 lines cover token types, methods, username or password, and session fields and target authentication state and message authorization rather than XSS. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 处理器对空值/字符串 null/弱凭据做宽松真值转换，或连接建立后未将每条消息重新绑定到已认证主体。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: The handler loosely coerces empty values or string null and weak credentials, or fails to bind every post-connection message to the authenticated principal. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先建立未认证、低权限和高权限基线，再一次测试一种类型/方法变体并读取服务器端主体，最后尝试一项无副作用授权查询。 阳性要求无效/低权限输入被绑定为更高权限主体并获得对象访问；auth ACK、连接保持、通用欢迎消息或错误文本变化都不够。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Establish unauthenticated, low-, and high-privilege baselines, test one type or method variant at a time, inspect the server principal, and perform one side-effect-free authorization query. Positive evidence requires invalid or low-privilege input to bind as a more privileged principal and gain object access; an auth acknowledgment, open connection, generic welcome, or changed error text is insufficient. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对 schema 和类型严格验证，使用成熟认证流程，轮换会话，并在每条消息按主体、对象和动作执行服务端授权。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Validate schema and types strictly, use a mature authentication flow, rotate sessions, and enforce server-side subject, object, and action authorization on every message. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket 消息认证前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket Message Authentication prerequisites

description.zh: 22 行覆盖 token 类型、method、用户名/口令和会话字段，目标是认证状态机与消息授权，不是 XSS。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The 22 lines cover token types, methods, username or password, and session fields and target authentication state and message authorization rather than XSS. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket 消息认证对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket Message Authentication comparison

description.zh: 先建立未认证、低权限和高权限基线，再一次测试一种类型/方法变体并读取服务器端主体，最后尝试一项无副作用授权查询。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Establish unauthenticated, low-, and high-privilege baselines, test one type or method variant at a time, inspect the server principal, and perform one side-effect-free authorization query. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket 消息认证阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket Message Authentication positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性要求无效/低权限输入被绑定为更高权限主体并获得对象访问；auth ACK、连接保持、通用欢迎消息或错误文本变化都不够。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires invalid or low-privilege input to bind as a more privileged principal and gain object access; an auth acknowledgment, open connection, generic welcome, or changed error text is insufficient. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket 消息认证
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket Message Authentication

description.zh: 对 schema 和类型严格验证，使用成熟认证流程，轮换会话，并在每条消息按主体、对象和动作执行服务端授权。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Validate schema and types strictly, use a mature authentication flow, rotate sessions, and enforce server-side subject, object, and action authorization on every message. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 空字符串、null、`"null"`、0、-1 与 method=none 只用于检测类型/状态机错误；admin/admin 等弱凭据成功是凭据策略问题，不自动等于认证绕过。会话字段必须仅用自有测试会话。只有最终主体或对象权限越界才是阳性。
analysis.en: Empty string, null, `"null"`, zero, minus one, and method=none probe type and state-machine flaws. Success with admin/admin is a credential-policy issue and not automatically an auth bypass. Session fields must use owned test sessions. Only an incorrect final principal or object-authorization boundary is positive.

opsecTips.zh: 首次证明测试低权限账号获得一项越权读取后停止，不修改对象、发送管理消息或尝试真实会话 ID。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the test low-privilege account gains one unauthorized read and do not modify objects, send administrative messages, or try real session IDs.

opsecTips.zh: 注销并撤销所有测试 token/session，关闭套接字，删除 auth 消息日志中的凭据并恢复测试账号权限。
opsecTips.en: Log out and revoke all test tokens and sessions, close sockets, remove credentials from auth-message logs, and restore test-account permissions.

review.rationale: 这是 WebSocket 认证状态机和对象授权问题，真实分类为认证漏洞。

name.zh: WebSocket 消息与 HTTP 边界走私探针
name.en: WebSocket Message and HTTP Boundary-Smuggling Probes

description.zh: 比较同一 WebSocket 帧内连续 JSON 文档与嵌入 HTTP 请求文本，验证网关、消息解析器和后端是否产生边界分歧。
description.en: Compares concatenated JSON documents in one WebSocket frame with embedded HTTP request text to test boundary disagreements among gateways, message parsers, and backends.

prerequisites.zh: 能够抓取 WebSocket 帧边界、应用 JSON 解析事件与任何 HTTP 网关/后端连接，确认消息是否跨协议转发。
prerequisites.en: Capture WebSocket frame boundaries, application JSON parse events, and any HTTP gateway or backend connection to determine whether messages cross protocols.

prerequisites.zh: 使用隔离 `/admin` 测试路由和无副作用操作，后端日志可区分一个帧、两个 JSON 值与一个合法 HTTP 请求。
prerequisites.en: Use an isolated `/admin` test route with a side-effect-free action, and backend logs that distinguish one frame, two JSON values, and one valid HTTP request.

overview.zh: WebSocket 消息与 HTTP 边界走私探针聚焦第 0 行是同帧连续 JSON 边界测试；第 1-2 行意图表示 HTTP 请求，但缺少必需 CRLF/空行，源文本本身不是合法 HTTP/1.1。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: WebSocket Message and HTTP Boundary-Smuggling Probes focuses on this boundary: Line 0 tests concatenated JSON values in one frame; lines 1-2 intend HTTP requests but lack required CRLF separators and the empty line, so the source text is not valid HTTP/1.1. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 如果前端按帧、应用按流或代理把 WebSocket 数据重解释为 HTTP，不同组件可能对消息起止位置达成不同结论。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: If a frontend treats frames, an application treats a stream, or a proxy reinterprets WebSocket data as HTTP, components may disagree about message start and end. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先测试一个合法 JSON 与两个独立帧，再发送第 0 行同帧拼接；HTTP 分支仅使用 review 建议的 CRLF 修正版做隔离协议测试。 阳性要求两个组件产生可证明的边界分歧并使受控第二消息到达错误上下文；JSON 解析错误、断连、400 或原缺 CRLF 文本不算走私。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Test one valid JSON value and two separate frames before sending line 0 concatenated in one frame; use only the CRLF-corrected review suggestion for isolated HTTP protocol testing. Positive evidence requires demonstrable boundary disagreement between components that delivers a controlled second message into the wrong context; JSON parse errors, disconnects, 400 responses, or the source text without CRLF are not smuggling. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 严格按 RFC 6455 帧与应用消息 schema 解析，每帧只接受一个 JSON 值；禁止将消息文本重新解释为原始 HTTP，并统一代理/后端边界。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Parse RFC 6455 frames and the application schema strictly, accept one JSON value per message, never reinterpret message text as raw HTTP, and align proxy and backend boundaries. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认WebSocket/HTTP 消息边界前置条件
title.en: Confirm WebSocket and HTTP Message Boundaries prerequisites

description.zh: 第 0 行是同帧连续 JSON 边界测试；第 1-2 行意图表示 HTTP 请求，但缺少必需 CRLF/空行，源文本本身不是合法 HTTP/1.1。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: Line 0 tests concatenated JSON values in one frame; lines 1-2 intend HTTP requests but lack required CRLF separators and the empty line, so the source text is not valid HTTP/1.1. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控WebSocket/HTTP 消息边界对照
title.en: Run a controlled WebSocket and HTTP Message Boundaries comparison

description.zh: 先测试一个合法 JSON 与两个独立帧，再发送第 0 行同帧拼接；HTTP 分支仅使用 review 建议的 CRLF 修正版做隔离协议测试。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Test one valid JSON value and two separate frames before sending line 0 concatenated in one frame; use only the CRLF-corrected review suggestion for isolated HTTP protocol testing. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

title.zh: 核对WebSocket/HTTP 消息边界阳性边界
title.en: Verify WebSocket and HTTP Message Boundaries positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性要求两个组件产生可证明的边界分歧并使受控第二消息到达错误上下文；JSON 解析错误、断连、400 或原缺 CRLF 文本不算走私。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires demonstrable boundary disagreement between components that delivers a controlled second message into the wrong context; JSON parse errors, disconnects, 400 responses, or the source text without CRLF are not smuggling. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归WebSocket/HTTP 消息边界
title.en: Remediate and regress WebSocket and HTTP Message Boundaries

description.zh: 严格按 RFC 6455 帧与应用消息 schema 解析，每帧只接受一个 JSON 值；禁止将消息文本重新解释为原始 HTTP，并统一代理/后端边界。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Parse RFC 6455 frames and the application schema strictly, accept one JSON value per message, never reinterpret message text as raw HTTP, and align proxy and backend boundaries. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 只有第 0 行可直接作为 JSON 消息边界探针。第 1、2 行把请求行、Host 与正文粘在一起，缺少 `\r\n` 和头部终止空行，不能产生合规 HTTP 请求；其错误/拒绝是预期负对照。修正建议仅写在 review，源 execution 必须零漂移。
analysis.en: Only line 0 is directly usable as a JSON message-boundary probe. Lines 1 and 2 concatenate the request line, Host, and body without `\r\n` or the terminating empty line, so they cannot form compliant HTTP requests; rejection is the expected negative control. Corrections belong only in review while source execution remains byte-for-byte unchanged.

opsecTips.zh: 首次确认受控第二 JSON 值被错误解析后停止，不向真实管理路由发送删除动作，也不跨租户连接。
opsecTips.en: Stop after a controlled second JSON value is misparsed and do not send delete actions to real administration routes or cross tenant connections.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭测试 WebSocket/后端连接，删除隔离路由记录，清空代理缓冲与连接池，并确认无半开 HTTP 请求残留。
opsecTips.en: Close test WebSocket and backend connections, delete isolated-route records, drain proxy buffers and pools, and verify no half-open HTTP request remains.

review.rationale: 真实问题是消息/协议边界分歧；两条缺少 CRLF 的 HTTP 原例已由 stale-safe 命令补丁改成带请求行、头部边界、Content-Length 与终止空行的无害 preview/status 测试请求。

commandCorrectionSuggestions.issue: The HTTP/1.1 example lacks CRLF separators, a Host header boundary, Content-Length, and the terminating empty line.
commandCorrectionSuggestions.suggestedCommand:
POST /admin/preview HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Content-Length: 13

action=status

commandCorrectionSuggestions.issue: The HTTP/1.1 example lacks CRLF separators and the terminating empty line.
commandCorrectionSuggestions.suggestedCommand:
GET /admin/preview HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com
Cookie: session=TEST_SESSION

name.zh: 跨源 opener 导航能力对照

description.zh: 比较对 opener.location 的赋值、href/replace/assign 调用、跨源 document 访问及 data/javascript URL，验证同源策略允许和阻止的能力。
description.en: Compares assignment to opener.location, href, replace, assign, cross-origin document access, and data or javascript URLs to test capabilities allowed and blocked by same-origin policy.

prerequisites.zh: 通过显式 rel=opener 或无 noopener 的脚本 window.open 建立受控 opener，并确认 COOP 未将浏览上下文组分离。
prerequisites.en: Establish a controlled opener through explicit rel=opener or script window.open without noopener and confirm COOP does not separate the browsing context group.
