prerequisites.zh: opener 与新页使用不同受控源，导航只指向无害标记页，并捕获 SecurityError、控制台与导航日志。
prerequisites.en: Use different controlled origins for opener and child, navigate only to a harmless marker page, and capture SecurityError, console, and navigation logs.

overview.zh: 跨源 opener 导航能力对照聚焦前四类语句测试跨源 Location 能力，document.location 需跨过 SOP，data/javascript 还受现代导航安全限制；不是 XSS。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Cross-Origin Opener Navigation Capability Controls focuses on this boundary: The first forms test cross-origin Location capabilities, document.location crosses SOP, and data or javascript schemes face modern navigation restrictions; this is not XSS. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 新页保留 opener 时可在有限跨源 WindowProxy/Location 能力内导航原页，但不能读取或任意操作跨源 document。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: When a child retains opener, it can navigate the original page through limited cross-origin WindowProxy or Location capabilities but cannot read or arbitrarily manipulate the cross-origin document. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 先确认 opener 非空，再逐行记录受控导航或 SecurityError；location 赋值/href/replace 与 assign/document/data/javascript 分开判断。 阳性 Tabnabbing 是子页使 opener 导航到受控标记 URL；能读取 document、执行 javascript 或 data 页面必须有独立证据，异常或静默失败不算。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Confirm a non-null opener, then record controlled navigation or SecurityError per line, evaluating assignment, href, and replace separately from assign, document, data, and javascript cases. Positive tabnabbing is the child navigating the opener to a controlled marker URL; document reads, javascript execution, or data-page navigation require independent evidence, and exceptions or silent failure are not positive. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 默认切断 opener，使用 noopener/noreferrer 与 COOP；必须通信时仅对受信源使用 postMessage 并严格校验 origin。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Sever opener by default with noopener, noreferrer, and COOP; when communication is required, use postMessage only with trusted origins and strict origin validation. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认opener 跨源导航前置条件
title.en: Confirm Cross-Origin Opener Navigation prerequisites

description.zh: 前四类语句测试跨源 Location 能力，document.location 需跨过 SOP，data/javascript 还受现代导航安全限制；不是 XSS。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The first forms test cross-origin Location capabilities, document.location crosses SOP, and data or javascript schemes face modern navigation restrictions; this is not XSS. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控opener 跨源导航对照
title.en: Run a controlled Cross-Origin Opener Navigation comparison

description.zh: 先确认 opener 非空，再逐行记录受控导航或 SecurityError；location 赋值/href/replace 与 assign/document/data/javascript 分开判断。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Confirm a non-null opener, then record controlled navigation or SecurityError per line, evaluating assignment, href, and replace separately from assign, document, data, and javascript cases. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

attackChain.payload:
window.opener.location = "https://phishing.com" window.opener.location.href = "https://phishing.com" window.opener.location.replace("https://phishing.com") window.opener.location.assign("https://phishing.com") window.opener.document.location = "https://phishing.com" window.opener.document.location.href = "https://phishing.com" window.opener.location = "https://phishing.com/login" window.opener.location = "data:text/html,

Please login again

" window.opener.location = "javascript:document.write('

Please login again

')"

title.zh: 核对opener 跨源导航阳性边界
title.en: Verify Cross-Origin Opener Navigation positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性 Tabnabbing 是子页使 opener 导航到受控标记 URL；能读取 document、执行 javascript 或 data 页面必须有独立证据，异常或静默失败不算。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive tabnabbing is the child navigating the opener to a controlled marker URL; document reads, javascript execution, or data-page navigation require independent evidence, and exceptions or silent failure are not positive. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归opener 跨源导航
title.en: Remediate and regress Cross-Origin Opener Navigation

description.zh: 默认切断 opener，使用 noopener/noreferrer 与 COOP；必须通信时仅对受信源使用 postMessage 并严格校验 origin。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Sever opener by default with noopener, noreferrer, and COOP; when communication is required, use postMessage only with trusted origins and strict origin validation. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 跨源情况下，`window.opener.location =`、`.href =` 与规范暴露的 `replace()` 可作为受控导航候选；`assign()` 并非跨源暴露方法，`window.opener.document.*` 会受 SOP 阻止。data 与 javascript 顶级导航在现代浏览器受到额外限制，不能从字符串存在推断执行。所有测试还要求 opener 非空。
analysis.en: Cross-origin assignment to `window.opener.location`, `.href`, and the exposed `replace()` method are controlled-navigation candidates. `assign()` is not a cross-origin exposed method, and `window.opener.document.*` is blocked by SOP. Top-level data and javascript navigation face additional modern restrictions and cannot be inferred from string presence. Every case also requires a non-null opener.

opsecTips.zh: 原窗口首次导航到本地标记页后停止，不使用钓鱼表单、data 页面、javascript 写入或真实账号会话。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the original window first navigates to a local marker page; do not use phishing forms, data pages, javascript writes, or real account sessions.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭父子窗口，清理历史记录、站点数据和导航日志，恢复 noopener/COOP 并删除临时标记页。
opsecTips.en: Close parent and child windows, clear history, site data, and navigation logs, restore noopener and COOP, and delete the temporary marker page.

review.rationale: 这是 opener 跨源导航/Tabnabbing 能力对照，不是 XSS；修正了原名称乱码。

lineSemantics.note: Location assignment, href setter, and replace are cross-origin navigation candidates when opener is non-null.
Location.assign is not exposed as a cross-origin callable method.
Cross-origin access through opener.document is blocked by SOP.
A path URL uses the same Location assignment capability as line 0.
Top-level data and javascript navigations face modern browser restrictions and cannot be assumed to execute.

name.zh: 反向 Tabnabbing opener 正负对照
name.en: Reverse-Tabnabbing Opener Positive and Negative Controls

description.zh: 比较 rel=opener、冲突 rel 关键字与 window.open feature，验证新页面是否真实持有 opener 并可受控导航原窗口。
description.en: Compares rel=opener, conflicting rel keywords, and window.open features to determine whether a new page truly retains opener and can navigate the original window.

subCategory.zh: 反向 Tabnabbing opener 控制

prerequisites.zh: 父页、子页和无害导航目标均由授权测试域控制，记录浏览器版本、COOP 与 window.open 返回值。
prerequisites.en: Parent, child, and harmless navigation destination are controlled, with browser version, COOP, and window.open return values recorded.

prerequisites.zh: 子页只检查 opener 是否为空并导航到固定标记页，不显示认证界面或收集用户输入。
prerequisites.en: The child only checks whether opener is null and navigates to a fixed marker page, without authentication UI or user-input collection.

overview.zh: 反向 Tabnabbing opener 正负对照聚焦九行混合真正的 opener opt-in、noopener/noreferrer 负对照、脚本 window.open 与一条逻辑错误的自我导航示例。 审校时必须先确认浏览器/协议版本、执行主体和受控测试对象，并保留正常基线。
overview.en: Reverse-Tabnabbing Opener Positive and Negative Controls focuses on this boundary: The nine lines mix genuine opener opt-in, noopener or noreferrer negative controls, script window.open, and one logically flawed self-navigation example. Confirm browser or protocol version, execution principal, and controlled test objects, and retain a normal baseline.

vulnerability.zh: 只有子页获得 opener 引用且浏览上下文策略允许导航时，反向 Tabnabbing 才成立；冲突关键字与 COOP 可切断引用。 风险必须落到实际浏览上下文、消息 sink、认证主体或后端资源，不能从字符串外观推断。
vulnerability.en: Reverse tabnabbing exists only when the child receives an opener reference and browsing-context policy permits navigation; conflicting link types and COOP can sever it. Risk must be tied to the actual browsing context, message sink, authenticated principal, or backend resource rather than inferred from string appearance.

exploitation.zh: 逐行打开受控子页，由子页报告 opener 状态并尝试一次标记导航；分别记录链接 rel 与 window.open feature 的结果。 阳性必须由子页代码控制父页导航；父页自身 onclick 导航、仅返回 WindowProxy、新标签打开或目标页加载都不是攻击证据。 关联浏览器 DevTools、握手/消息日志和后端审计，形成明确阳性与阴性对照。
exploitation.en: Open the controlled child per line, have the child report opener state and attempt one marker navigation, and record results for link rel and window.open features separately. Positive evidence requires child code to control parent navigation; navigation by the parent's own onclick, a returned WindowProxy, a new tab, or destination loading is not attack evidence. Correlate browser DevTools, handshake or message logs, and backend audit to establish explicit positive and negative controls.

mitigation.zh: 对不受信目标使用 noopener/noreferrer 和 COOP，不混用 opener 与隔离关键字；需要通信时用受限 postMessage。 修复后重放相同对照，合法浏览器/WebSocket 功能应保留，越权能力或解析差异应消失。
mitigation.en: Use noopener, noreferrer, and COOP for untrusted destinations, do not mix opener with isolation keywords, and use constrained postMessage when communication is required. Replay the same controls after remediation; valid browser or WebSocket behavior should remain while unauthorized capability or parsing differences disappear.

title.zh: 确认反向 Tabnabbing opener 控制前置条件
title.en: Confirm Reverse-Tabnabbing Opener Controls prerequisites

description.zh: 九行混合真正的 opener opt-in、noopener/noreferrer 负对照、脚本 window.open 与一条逻辑错误的自我导航示例。 记录正常行为、组件版本、安全头、消息 schema 及相关日志。
description.en: The nine lines mix genuine opener opt-in, noopener or noreferrer negative controls, script window.open, and one logically flawed self-navigation example. Record normal behavior, component versions, security headers, message schema, and relevant logs.

title.zh: 执行受控反向 Tabnabbing opener 控制对照
title.en: Run a controlled Reverse-Tabnabbing Opener Controls comparison

description.zh: 逐行打开受控子页，由子页报告 opener 状态并尝试一次标记导航；分别记录链接 rel 与 window.open feature 的结果。 一次只改变一个浏览器能力、消息字段或协议边界，并使用无害标记。
description.en: Open the controlled child per line, have the child report opener state and attempt one marker navigation, and record results for link rel and window.open features separately. Change one browser capability, message field, or protocol boundary at a time and use a harmless marker.

attackChain.payload: Click here Click here Click here Click here Click here window.open("https://evil.com/tabnabbing", "_blank") window.open("https://evil.com/tabnabbing", "_blank", "noopener") window.open("https://evil.com/tabnabbing", "_blank", "noreferrer") window.open("https://evil.com/tabnabbing", "_blank", "noopener,noreferrer")

title.zh: 核对反向 Tabnabbing opener 控制阳性边界
title.en: Verify Reverse-Tabnabbing Opener Controls positive boundaries

description.zh: 阳性必须由子页代码控制父页导航；父页自身 onclick 导航、仅返回 WindowProxy、新标签打开或目标页加载都不是攻击证据。 同时排除回显、客户端自执行、通用错误和手工客户端伪造能力。
description.en: Positive evidence requires child code to control parent navigation; navigation by the parent's own onclick, a returned WindowProxy, a new tab, or destination loading is not attack evidence. Also exclude reflection, client self-execution, generic errors, and capabilities introduced only by a manual client.

title.zh: 修复并回归反向 Tabnabbing opener 控制
title.en: Remediate and regress Reverse-Tabnabbing Opener Controls

description.zh: 对不受信目标使用 noopener/noreferrer 和 COOP，不混用 opener 与隔离关键字；需要通信时用受限 postMessage。 重放正常、阳性和阴性样例并完成测试数据清理。
description.en: Use noopener, noreferrer, and COOP for untrusted destinations, do not mix opener with isolation keywords, and use constrained postMessage when communication is required. Replay normal, positive, and negative cases and complete test-data cleanup.

analysis.zh: 行 0 的 rel=opener 与行 3/5 的无 noopener window.open 是阳性候选；行 1 中 noopener 应压过 opener，行 2 的 noreferrer 蕴含 noopener，行 6-8 明确切断 opener。行 4 从父页执行 `w.opener.location`，实际导航的是父页自身引用，不证明恶意子页控制 opener，应作为逻辑负对照。
analysis.en: Line 0 with rel=opener and lines 3 or 5 using window.open without noopener are positive candidates. Noopener should dominate opener on line 1, noreferrer implies noopener on line 2, and lines 6-8 explicitly sever opener. Line 4 runs `w.opener.location` from the parent and navigates the parent's own reference; it does not prove control by a malicious child and is a logical negative control.

opsecTips.zh: 子页首次把父页导航到本地标记后停止，不生成钓鱼内容、不收集凭据，也不测试真实外部站点。
opsecTips.en: Stop after the child first navigates the parent to a local marker; do not generate phishing content, collect credentials, or test real external sites.

opsecTips.zh: 关闭所有弹窗/标签，清除历史与站点数据，恢复 COOP/链接属性并删除父子测试页及日志。
opsecTips.en: Close all popups and tabs, clear history and site data, restore COOP and link attributes, and delete parent and child test pages and logs.

review.rationale: 该条保留为 Tabnabbing 正负对照，明确冲突关键字与错误自我导航示例。

lineSemantics.note: Explicit rel=opener can retain opener when browser policy permits.
noopener suppresses opener even when opener is also listed.
noreferrer implies noopener and suppresses opener.
window.open without noopener can retain opener, subject to COOP and browser policy.
The parent script navigates its own reference through w.opener; this is not child-controlled tabnabbing.
window.open without feature isolation can retain opener.
noopener or noreferrer features sever opener.
